title: Death Chests
description: This mod saves your items in a chest when you die
body:
This mod creates two chests with all of the players items in it when they die. So that they won't loose their stuff.

This mod is server side only, meaning it can be installed on the server and the clients don't need this mod installed for it to work.

If you want to play Singleplayer, this mod works too.

![Example of player dying and chest spawning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb1c30fa2f7b3294a4182e51495faafbe52b8624.gif)

### Works well with this mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/death-coords](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-coords)
